title: Generation pipeline + sampling strategies
description:
Implement the token generation pipeline with multiple sampling strategies and stop conditions.

src/generation/pipeline.rs:
- GenerationPipeline: tokenize → prefill → decode loop → detokenize
- Prefill: entire prompt in one forward pass, populate KV-cache
- Decode: one token at a time, appending to KV-cache
- Streaming: optional callback per generated token

src/generation/sampler.rs:
- GreedySampler: argmax of logits
- TemperatureSampler: logits/temperature → softmax → sample
- TopKSampler: keep top K, zero rest, sample
- TopPSampler: sort, cumsum probs, keep until >= p
- RepetitionPenalty: divide logits of already-generated tokens
- CombinedSampler: chain temperature → top_k → top_p → repetition penalty

src/generation/stopping.rs:
- StopCondition: EOS token, max_length, stop_sequences (string matching)

src/generation/output.rs:
- GenerationOutput: text, token_ids, num_tokens, elapsed, tokens_per_sec

src/generation/mod.rs: re-exports

Tests (mandatory):
- Greedy deterministic (100 runs same output)
- Temperature=0 ≡ greedy, TopK=1 ≡ greedy, TopP=0.0 ≡ greedy
- Temperature=1.0 has entropy
- Repetition penalty lowers repeated token probability
- Stop on EOS and max_length work correctly
- Streaming callback receives each token
- Prefill+decode matches single forward for short sequences

Pass/fail:
- Greedy is deterministic
- Valid probability distributions (sum=1, non-negative)
- Stop conditions work
- Streaming works
